description: One inbound-consignment record (one block per arriving shipment) that captures the manual inbound-logistics tracking layer (transport mode, carrier, customs clearance, ETA monitoring) and the per-item delivered quantities for that consignment. A PO/requisition can have many blocks; delivered quantity aggregates per item across all blocks. The block carries the RA partial-delivery model plus the AB inbound-logistics fields, and validates the PARTIAL_DELIVERY stage advance.

fields.name: grnId
fields.label: Goods Receipt
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the consignment has been received into a GRN (materials path); null while in-transit or on the no-GRN spares/services path
fields.validation: resolves to a GRN of the same PO when set
fields.purpose: Links the consignment block to the GRN it produced; multiple blocks under one PO each map to their own receipt, supporting one-PO-many-GRNs partial deliveries.

fields.name: transportMode
fields.label: Transport Mode
fields.validation: one of {Air, Sea, Road, Courier}; drives the mode-specific document set and customs routing
fields.purpose: The branch driver of the inbound-tracking block: it selects which document fields are mandatory and whether the consignment routes through customs (air/sea/cross-border road) or direct (courier/domestic road).

fields.name: carrier
fields.label: Carrier / Line Name
fields.purpose: The airline / shipping line / road transporter / courier moving the consignment; the manual tracking handle (no auto-fetch from carrier portals).

fields.name: courierCargo
fields.label: Courier / Cargo
fields.purpose: The RA block field naming the courier or cargo handler for the consignment; supplements carrier for courier/cargo movements.

fields.name: trackingNumber_MAWB_HAWB
fields.label: Tracking / AWB-BL Reference
fields.validation: free text; Master/House Air Waybill, Bill of Lading, Lorry Receipt, or courier tracking number per mode
fields.purpose: The transport-document reference for the mode; the single field a handler watches to track the consignment to arrival.

fields.name: eta
fields.label: ETA
fields.validation: valid date; editable throughout the voyage; each revision re-arms the ETA-approaching alarm and is audited
fields.purpose: The expected arrival date that drives the ETA-approaching alarm (default 5 days before, configurable) to handler, requester and manager; the monitoring beat of inbound logistics.

fields.name: etaAlarmLeadDays
fields.label: ETA Alarm Lead (days)
fields.purpose: How many days before the ETA the approaching-arrival alarm fires; configurable lead so the team can prepare receiving and clearance.

fields.name: boeNumber
fields.label: Bill of Entry / Bayan No.
fields.mandatoryCondition: imports cleared through customs (air, sea, cross-border road)
fields.validation: free text; from the customs clearance step
fields.purpose: The customs bill-of-entry / Bayan number for an import consignment; evidence of clearance and the link to duty and reverse-charge/import-VAT for the invoice.

fields.name: clearanceBy
fields.label: Cleared By (Agent)
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when a customs clearance was performed
fields.validation: records the authorizing clearing agent (user or free-text agent name)
fields.purpose: The clearing agent who authorized customs release; the traceability-to-person record ISO requires for the clearance event.

fields.name: homeMOOWR
fields.label: Bonded / MOOWR
fields.validation: RA block flag; bonded-warehouse / Manufacturing-and-Other-Operations-in-Warehouse scheme indicator
fields.purpose: Flags a bonded / MOOWR clearance so duty deferment is reflected in landed cost and tax treatment for the consignment.

fields.name: actualDeliveryDate
fields.label: Actual Delivery Date
fields.validation: valid date; date the consignment physically arrived at site
fields.purpose: The real arrival date for the consignment; compared to the PO committed delivery date for the overdue check and the OTD / two-factor OTIF score, and a mandatory field gating the PARTIAL_DELIVERY stage advance.

fields.name: erpGrNumber
fields.label: ERP GR Number
fields.validation: free text; GR number from the ERP boundary
fields.purpose: Cross-references the consignment to the GR posted in the external ERP, reconciling the block with the system of record.

fields.name: erpCcNumber
fields.label: ERP CC Number
fields.purpose: The RA free-text ERP customs-clearance / control-code reference carried on the block for ERP reconciliation.

fields.name: itemsDelivery
fields.label: Items Delivered
fields.validation: array of {itemId (string), quantity (finite number)}; may list a subset of lines; entries with a non-string id or non-finite quantity are skipped silently; null/empty becomes empty array
fields.purpose: Per-item quantities in this consignment; summed per itemId across all blocks (no de-dup, order-dependent) to give the delivered quantity that derives item/ticket delivery status and progress.

fields.name: deliveryStatus
fields.label: Delivery Status
fields.validation: derived on demand, never stored; precedence delivered > partial > overdue > upcoming
fields.computedFormula: per item: delivered if aggregatedDelivered >= ordered (over-delivery counts); partial if 0 < delivered < ordered; overdue if delivered = 0 AND needDate < start-of-today (null needDate never overdue); else upcoming. Ticket rolls up by the same precedence.
fields.purpose: The live derived status (never persisted) shown on dashboards and rolled up to the requisition; the operational read of how far a delivery has progressed.

invariants: A8 GRN raised from the materials block selects THREE_WAY match
A12 duty/landed-cost amounts normalized to base via FX
A13 audit (entityType PARTIAL_DELIVERY_BLOCK) + SSE ticket.updated on every change
delivered quantity aggregates per itemId across all blocks; delivery status derived, never stored
PARTIAL_DELIVERY -> POST_DELIVERY advance validates the mandatory block fields per block (A2)
